source.section: 2.2.3 - EXP (Expanded) Modes > 2.2.3.1 - EXP1 (Sector Map) > How to Select EXP1 Mode

steps.action: Make sure air-to-ground mapping (MAP) mode is selected (see section 2.2.2).
Press the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the radar screen (RIGHT) to slave the TDC (Throttle Designation Controller) to the current radar screen (diamond should be visible).
Press on the OSB (Option Select Button) next to EXP1.
Press and hold TDC DEPRESS control (« ENTER »).
While TDC DEPRESS is held, slew the trapezoidal corral over the desired region you want to set as a sector map (zoom) using the TDC controls.
Release the TDC DEPRESS control to enter EXP1 mode. Corral
The air-to-ground radar will automatically adjust its range to give you a better view of the region you just expanded.
You can designate a target using the method described in section 2.2.3.4 (Designation with EXP mode).

Pressing the « Undesignate » button on the stick will exit EXP1 mode. Undesignate / Nosewheel Steering Button Beirut Rafic Hariri Airport EXP1 Region FAST Option Boxing the FAST scan option doubles the radar's rate of scan for a reduction of approximately half the scan quality.
